svg.title: HyperWeave — Where Vectors Meet Vision
svg.desc: Visual infrastructure for the agentic web. Living SVG Artifacts with zero JavaScript.

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Social sharing preview with full sapphire crystal DNA from V11 banner
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Hero composition: transmitter left with octahedron scaffold, typography right. Full sapphire filter chain (core+halo+ambient+caustic), atmospheric nebula, phi-ratio motion cascade. Dark sapphire substrate for social card compatibility.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Static platforms (Twitter/LinkedIn) show frozen frame — gradient initial state designed for visual impact without animation. Dark substrate (#060420) required instead of transparent for social card rendering. Formidable typography at 72px with italic weight matches banner severity.

g.text: Visual infrastructure for the agentic web
